strengths: Currently building AI-agent infrastructure with MCP protocol development at Staff level—directly executes the emerging AI-agent requirement listed in the job description

13+ years of full-stack TypeScript, Node.js, React mastery across high-scale systems (millions of concurrent requests, millions of annual transactions); comprehensively covers primary stack requirements

Proven architecture excellence and testing-first culture: TDD advocate, organized refactoring dojos, scaled systems handling millions of requests/second, demonstrating the craftsmanship and reliability the role demands
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned despite being primary framework; however, deep Node.js architecture at Staff level indicates rapid framework adoption would be straightforward
Kotlin/Java secondary stack work is dated (2016–2018); however, Java fundamentals remain solid from systems-level work, and these are specified as 'select backend services' rather than primary focus
Vitest not explicitly named in testing experience; Jest and custom D testing frameworks are mentioned, suggesting some toolchain onboarding needed beyond testing fundamentals

key_factors.factor: Active AI Agent & MCP Infrastructure Development
Demonstrated Large-Scale Architecture & Testing Culture Leadership

response.justification: Bogdan is an exceptionally strong match: he is currently a Staff Engineer building the exact AI-agent infrastructure the role specifies, with 13+ years of full-stack TypeScript/Node.js/React development proven at scale (millions of requests per second, millions of mails annually). His career demonstrates consistent architectural leadership—leading high-impact systems, driving TDD adoption, and scaling databases and cloud infrastructure. While Nest.js and Vitest are not explicitly named, his deep Node.js architectural expertise and proven testing philosophy position him to master these tools immediately. The role appears designed around work he is already doing.
